specific_question: What proportion of employees said they receive their weekly schedule one week or less in advance at Lee's Market?
answer: 56% of retail employees received their schedule one week or less in advance at Lee's Market.
justification: Scheduling lead time pertains to employee operations rather than on-floor customer engagement. So it doesn't provide any valuable input to sales associates.
dr_question: What are some ways for Lee's Market to enhance on-floor customer engagement to offset the impact of Canada’s July 2025 retail sales decline of 0.8% and drive a measurable rebound in the remaining months of 2025?
